data.description:
## Description
Package the analyzer + its one pip dependency (lizard) behind an optional `[metrics]` extra, mirroring the existing `grounding`/`agents` extras. scc and jscpd are EXTERNAL CLIs (not pip deps) detected at runtime. A core-only install must import cleanly and degrade code_health to Unavailable.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `[project.optional-dependencies] metrics = ["lizard>=1.23"]` added to pyproject.toml with an explanatory comment (scc/jscpd noted as external CLIs).
- [ ] Analyzer imports of lizard go through `rebar._optional.guard_import(..., extra="metrics")` (lazy; `import rebar` and `import rebar.metrics` stay dependency-free).
- [ ] Core-only install (no extra): code_health metrics report Unavailable with a clear "install rebar[metrics]" style reason — no ImportError escapes.

## Verification
- [ ] Test simulating missing extra -> guard raises the friendly guidance / metric renders Unavailable.
- [ ] `pip install -e .` (no extra) then `rebar metrics` does not crash.

## Dependencies: Child 1 (interface)
## Files likely touched: pyproject.toml, src/rebar/metrics/analyzer.py, tests/unit/metrics/test_metrics_extra_guard.py (new)
## Estimated scope: S (2 files)
data.title: Add the optional [metrics] extra + lazy import guard (core stays dependency-free)
